name: Cedar Point
description: Peninsula park on Lake Erie known as "America's Roller Coast" for its dense lineup of record-setting coasters.

name: Six Flags Magic Mountain
description: Southern California coaster park with one of the largest coaster collections in the world.

name: Kings Island
description: Cincinnati-area park home to one of the longest wooden coasters ever built.

name: Universal's Islands of Adventure
description: Themed-land park adjoining Universal Studios Florida, built around immersive IP lands.

name: Disneyland Park
description: The original Disney theme park and birthplace of the modern theme park industry.

name: Six Flags Great Adventure
description: New Jersey park paired with a drive-through safari, known for extreme-height coasters.

name: Busch Gardens Williamsburg
description: European-themed park known for its landscaping and coaster collection.

name: Alton Towers
description: UK resort park built around a Gothic revival mansion and its historic gardens.

name: Europa Park
description: Family-owned European-themed park and one of the most visited theme parks in Europe.

name: Silver Dollar City
description: 1880s-frontier-themed park in the Ozarks known for its craftsmanship and coasters.

name: Universal Studios Florida
description: Film-and-TV-themed park adjoining Islands of Adventure, built around working studio backlot concepts.

name: Universal Studios Hollywood
description: Hollywood studio-tour-turned-theme-park set on a hillside above the Universal backlot.

name: Hersheypark
description: Chocolate-themed park that grew from a company picnic ground into a major coaster destination.

name: Dollywood
description: Smoky Mountains park co-owned by Dolly Parton, known for craftsmanship and record-setting coasters.

name: Knott's Berry Farm
description: America's first theme park, grown from a roadside berry stand and chicken restaurant.

name: PortAventura Park
description: Mediterranean-coast resort park divided into themed lands spanning several world regions.

name: Phantasialand
description: Densely-built German park known for immersive theming packed into a compact footprint.

name: Efteling
description: Fairy-tale-themed park built around a forest and storybook attractions.
